channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (short_term)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Forrest Frank @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-07-15 02:00 — Forrest Frank at Oakland Arena. Forrest Frank is gaining significant buzz with his unique blend of pop and indie influences, making this tour a must-see.

item.title: Rainbow Kitten Surprise @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-19 03:00 — Rainbow Kitten Surprise at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Rainbow Kitten Surprise is known for their captivating live performances and eclectic sound, promising an engaging show.

item.title: Bob Moses @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-18 02:30 — Bob Moses at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Bob Moses brings a strong electronic vibe with a reputation for immersive live experiences, appealing to both indie and electronic fans.

item.title: Young the Giant @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-20 01:00 — Young the Giant at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Young the Giant and Cold War Kids together create a powerful lineup, blending alternative rock with strong fan followings.

item.title: The Fray @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-24 01:00 — The Fray at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. The Fray and Dashboard Confessional evoke nostalgia while still appealing to a new generation, making this a compelling show.

item.title: Evanescence @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-07-21 02:00 — Evanescence at Shoreline Amphitheatre. Evanescence's reputation for dramatic and powerful performances makes this tour a significant event for rock fans.

item.title: George Michael Reborn - A Tribute to George Michael @ Toyota Pavilion at Concord
item.description: 2026-07-25 21:00 — George Michael Reborn - A Tribute to George Michael at Toyota Pavilion at Concord. Jimmy Eat World's 25th anniversary of 'Bleed American' is a nostalgic celebration that resonates with long-time fans.

item.title: ENHYPEN @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-07-29 02:30 → 2026-07-30 02:30 — ENHYPEN at Oakland Arena. ENHYPEN's popularity in the K-pop scene makes their shows highly anticipated events, attracting a diverse audience.

item.title: Widespread Panic @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-07-17 03:00 → 2026-07-19 03:00 — Widespread Panic at Fox Theater - Oakland. Widespread Panic's multi-night run offers a unique experience for jam band enthusiasts, with a loyal following.

item.title: WOODZ @ San Jose Civic
item.description: 2026-07-28 02:30 — WOODZ at San Jose Civic. WOODZ's world tour showcases a rising K-pop star, tapping into the growing interest in global pop phenomena.

item.title: Benson Boone @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-08-08 03:00 — Benson Boone at SAP Center at San Jose. Benson Boone's emerging talent and strong online presence make his tour a noteworthy event for pop music fans.

item.title: Jack Johnson @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-10-01 01:30 — Jack Johnson at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Jack Johnson's laid-back style and strong fan base promise a relaxing and enjoyable outdoor concert experience.

item.title: Tedeschi Trucks Band @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-08-13 01:00 — Tedeschi Trucks Band at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Tedeschi Trucks Band's blend of blues and rock is known for its high-energy performances, appealing to a wide audience.

item.title: Passion Pit @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-08-17 02:30 — Passion Pit at Fox Theater - Oakland. Passion Pit's return with a new tour promises to deliver their signature synth-pop sound to eager fans.

item.title: Train @ Shoreline Amphitheatre
item.description: 2026-08-27 01:45 — Train at Shoreline Amphitheatre. TRAIN's anniversary tour celebrates their classic hits, appealing to fans of nostalgic rock music.

item.title: Thievery Corporation @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-09-13 03:00 — Thievery Corporation at Fox Theater - Oakland. Courtney Barnett's distinctive voice and storytelling style make her shows a captivating experience for indie rock lovers.

item.title: Peter Noone @ Uptown Theatre Napa
item.description: 2026-08-08 03:00 — Peter Noone at Uptown Theatre Napa. Lil Wayne's 20-year celebration of 'The Carter' series is sure to attract hip-hop fans eager for a nostalgic experience.

item.title: Low Cut Connie @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-07-16 03:00 — Low Cut Connie at The Fillmore.
